---
title: "Ishbel Maria Hamilton-Gordon, Countess of Aberdeen"
---

## Ishbel Maria Hamilton-Gordon, Countess of Aberdeen

**Dates:** (1857-1939)

**Maiden name:** (Marjoribanks)

### Description

campaigner for women\'s rights, philanthropist

### Biography

She married (1877) the 7th Earl of Aberdeen (cr. 1916 1st Marquess of Aberdeen and Temair).

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 23rd 1893

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
